summary:
Only combine Triangles with Circles
and Squares with Diamonds

Bank purple right away, you cannot increase the value

Keep following the same combination of shapes above
message_how:
Combine Circles & Squares only and Triangles and Diamonds only

Combine a blank shape with a patterned shape to receive an upgraded version of the shape you were holding

Carry this over same method up into the upgraded shapes. This took too long for me to figure out so I didnt achieve as many points as I should have following this method
message_rules: Combine a blank shape with a shape with a pattern or vice versa. This will give you an upgraded version of the shape you were holding (i.e. holding blank red diamond + patterned triangle = patterned orange diamond) pr (holding patterned red square + blank circle = blank orange square).

summary: Fusion pairs: Diamonds/triangles; circles/squares.\nPatterns must match.\nDiamonds/triangles may be the bigger scorers.
message_how: Learn the pattern fusion order early on. Crystals dont respawn very quickly, so try to maximise a high chain, if you can.
message_rules: I was told the only shape pairs that work are diamonds with triangles and circles with squares. Same shapes do not fuse (eg. circles with circles).\n\nAlthough matching patterns guarantee a fusion, non-matching patterns can work within a certain order: plain - dotted - criss-cross (I was, unfortunately, not able to work out where diagonal stripes fitted into the order). If you can figure out the pattern order, it can help maximise your points chain.
